# LLMs.txt for Builder Contractors

Brand: Builder Contractors
Canonical Homepage: {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}

Product Description:
Builder Contractors is a platform that helps builders and contractors manage client onboarding, project workflows, and communications in one place, guiding teams from registration through ongoing project delivery.

Target Audience:
Builders and contractors.

Key Public URLs (aligned with sitemap.xml and robots.txt):
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/about
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/how-it-works
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/faq
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/pricing
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/us
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/us/about
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/us/how-it-works
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/us/faq
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/us/pricing
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/uk
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/uk/about
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/uk/how-it-works
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/uk/faq
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/uk/pricing
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/au
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/au/about
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/au/how-it-works
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/au/faq
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/au/pricing
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/login
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/register
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/sitemap.xml
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/robots.txt
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/llms.txt
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/llms-full.txt
- {{PUBLIC_SITE_URL}}/ai.txt

Geo guidance:
Marketing pages may be geo-targeted with region-specific prefixes. For example, /au/about is the Australia version of /about and should follow the corresponding regional content for that path. Add new region-prefixed paths here whenever marketing locales are added.

Do Not Use (private/authenticated or restricted paths):
- /dashboard
- /dashboard/*
- /api
- /api/*

Update Policy:
Updated with each marketing content release or sitemap refresh to stay in sync with marketing routes, sitemap.xml, and robots.txt.

AI consumption aliases:
- /ai.txt mirrors /llms.txt for assistants that probe ai.txt first.
- /llms-full.txt provides expanded retrieval context and summaries.
